purpose: User or host configuration contract for optional AI-assisted source recall. The plugin builds model requests but does not call external gateways by default.

default_behavior.secret_policy: Use api_key_env. Do not store raw API keys in plugin files, SQLite, git, or MCP arguments.

model.description: Host or gateway model name. This is user controlled and not interpreted by the plugin.

base_url.description: Optional gateway base URL for a user-managed adapter. The plugin does not call it by default.

api_key_env.description: Environment variable name that the host adapter may read. Raw key values must not be stored here.

forbidden_tasks: treat local_verify or candidate sources as final
send private evidence without explicit user approval
required_follow_up: run expanded queries back through worker_rights.search_sources
use deterministic tools for legal mapping and compensation

response_validation.candidate_id_policy: reranked_source_ids must be a subset of candidate_source_ids from worker_rights.plan_ai_recall
response_validation.secret_policy: raw api keys, bearer tokens, authorization headers, passwords, and secrets must be rejected and not echoed
response_validation.output_sanitization: secret-like text in rejected or needs_revision outputs is replaced with [redacted_sensitive_model_text] or suppressed from notes
